page: Alibaba Cloud ecs.c8a.2xlarge is a compute-optimized virtual machine instance powered by the KVM hypervisor. It features 8 dedicated physical cores of the x86_64 architecture, utilizing the AMD EPYC 9T24 processor running at a clock speed of 2.7 GHz. The system is equipped with 16.0 GB of system memory, yielding a resource density of 2.0 GB per core. No local storage or GPU hardware is bundled with this instance type, and it provides a baseline network bandwidth of 4 Gbps.

In benchmark evaluations, the instance demonstrates strong single-core CPU performance, ranking in the top 25% with a stress-ng single-core score of 3061.58. Multi-core performance falls within the average range, with a stress-ng multi-core score of 12260.34 and a PassMark CPU score of 14407.18. The AMD EPYC processor supports advanced instruction sets, including AVX-512 Foundation, AVX512_VNNI, and AVX512_BF16, which assist in vector and neural network operations. Cryptographic tasks are accelerated via hardware-supported AES, VAES, and SHA_NI instructions.

Given its 1:2 vCPU-to-RAM ratio, the ecs.c8a.2xlarge is structured for compute-bound workloads rather than memory-intensive applications. It achieves average performance in memory bandwidth, database operations, and static web serving, with a Redis SET throughput of 11.11 million operations per second. This profile offers qualitative cost efficiency for workloads requiring dedicated CPU execution resources without the overhead of excess memory. Appropriate workloads include single-threaded or moderately multi-threaded compute tasks, web serving, and cryptographic processing.
description: Alibaba Cloud ecs.c8a.2xlarge is a compute-optimized instance featuring 8 dedicated x86_64 physical cores powered by an AMD EPYC 9T24 processor running at 2.7 GHz. It is configured with 16.0 GB of RAM, providing a 2.0 GB per core ratio, and lacks local storage or GPU accelerators. Network performance is anchored by a baseline bandwidth of 4 Gbps. Benchmarks indicate strong single-core CPU performance, placing in the top 25%, alongside average multi-core and memory performance. The processor supports advanced vector and cryptographic instructions, including AVX-512 and AES. This instance is qualitatively cost-efficient for compute-heavy workloads that do not require large memory footprints, making it suitable for web serving, cryptographic tasks, and moderate batch processing.
og_description: Alibaba Cloud ecs.c8a.2xlarge is a compute-optimized instance featuring 8 dedicated AMD EPYC cores, 16.0 GB of RAM, and a 4 Gbps network baseline, delivering strong single-core performance for compute-bound workloads.
meta_description: Alibaba Cloud ecs.c8a.2xlarge is an 8-vCPU compute-optimized instance with 16.0 GB RAM, featuring dedicated AMD EPYC cores and strong single-core performance.
tagline: A dedicated compute-optimized instance delivering strong single-core performance and advanced vector instructions for CPU-intensive workloads.
bullet_points: 8 dedicated AMD EPYC 9T24 physical cores running at 2.7 GHz
16.0 GB of system memory providing a 1:2 vCPU-to-RAM ratio
Strong single-core CPU performance ranking in the top 25%
Hardware-accelerated cryptography and AVX-512 instruction support
4 Gbps baseline network bandwidth with no local storage
Best suited for web serving, cryptographic tasks, and compute-bound processing
